name: Sable Voss
excerpt: Sable Voss is a former supply administrator living with Dellan Moor after deserting the regiment.
notes: Sable Voss was a supply administrator in the 14th Lowland regiment. She and Dellan Moor decided to desert together after careful deliberation. They now live together in a disused waystation, having known each other since their time in the regiment. Their relationship developed during the decision to desert, and they have been living together for eight months.
